title: Part 3 – Conversation : évaluation annuelle
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Woman: I wanted to discuss your annual performance review before we submit it to HR. Overall, your results have been very strong this year. Man: Thank you. I've been working hard on the client satisfaction scores. Woman: It shows. You exceeded your targets by twelve percent. However, I'd like to see you take on more leadership responsibilities next year. Man: I'd be open to that. Are there specific projects you had in mind? Woman: Yes, I'd like you to lead the onboarding process for new team members. It's a good first step toward a team leader role. Man: That sounds great. I'm ready for the challenge.

questions.explanation: La femme dit : "I wanted to discuss your annual performance review".

questions.prompt: By how much did the man exceed his targets?
questions.explanation: "You exceeded your targets by twelve percent".

questions.prompt: What does the woman want the man to do next year?
choices: Lead the onboarding process for new team members
questions.explanation: "I'd like you to lead the onboarding process for new team members".
